initialValue:
name: terraform-prod-checks

on:
  pull_request:
    paths:
      - "infra/orders/prod/**"

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  terraform:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Set up Terraform
        uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v4
      - name: Init
        run: terraform -chdir=infra/orders/prod init -input=false

expected.label: pull request trigger stays scoped to the production Terraform path
workflow token keeps contents read permission
terraform job has checkout, setup, init, format, validate, and plan steps
speculative plan runs non-interactively after validation
